reviews.review_description: Why did they decide to force you to view the stars by rolling a ball with your head? I purchased this to look up and see exactly where a constellation would be. That's what made the original so great.

Not for me who is too clueless about the stars. I thought I was looking at the earth till I realized I was looking at the stars as an orb. That's when I knew it was time to uninstall. I'll give you an extra star for effort. Sorry.

I first wondered why someone would not display the night sky as a sphere with the observer at the center, but looking at this sphere from the outside is interesting. It allows the addition of various 3D effects that have their own benefits. 
Great graphics and animations.
Would love to see more details being added for the objects. And it would be great to have hi-res images of planets, nebulas, galaxies one could zoom into when selecting them.
If you're into astronomy, go and get it.
Stunning visuals and sound. Highly recommend!
Interesting visual environment,  the spherical mapping is interesting- at least makes for a different type of feeling. The animations are nice. Nothing too complex here, but worth a download.
Great app! Would be perfect in real time.
I enjoyed this app. Can't remember if it was free, but it is totally worth $1 or 2.
